positive: A highly stylized, symmetrical celestial map print for apparel. Feature an intricate, luminous constellation pattern (e.g., a stylized zodiac wheel or nebula) rendered using glowing, metallic gold line work connecting vibrant, deep teal, magenta, and sapphire gas clouds. The background is a gradient of deep, velvety midnight blue. Integrate minimalist, geometric depictions of planetary orbits and comets, giving the design a cohesive, Art Deco cosmic aesthetic. The composition must be central, clean, and possess strong, easily distinguishable silhouettes suitable for screen printing. Vector graphic quality, elegant, high contrast.
